targets.rawSql: SELECT recvtime::timestamp AS "time", 'Allal Al Fassi' AS metric, attrvalue::float AS value FROM irfane.smartcity_trafficsensor_irfane_001_trafficflowobserved WHERE attrname = 'vehicleFlowRate' AND recvtime::timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND recvtime::timestamp <= $__timeTo() ORDER BY time ASC
